cross_scene_arcs.title: Compassionate Assistance
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Marie repeatedly offers help to those in need, from Xenia to Hansi, showing consistent concern for others' well-being.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Concerned about the doctor and Xenia, proactively offering assistance.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Leading classmates to politely inquire about Hansi's health and offer help.
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: The actual condition of Xenia and Hansi, and whether Marie's help is effective.

cross_scene_arcs.title: Discipline and Redemption Cycle
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Marie is punished with a white ribbon, gradually reintegrated into family rituals and given responsibility, accepted as a church member, but then publicly humiliated by her father.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Sentenced to corporal punishment and marked with a white ribbon as a symbol of reform.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Publicly punished and humiliated in school after a period of acceptance.
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: Marie's standing with her father and the community, and the impact of repeated discipline on her.

cross_scene_arcs.title: Internal Conflict and Secrecy
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: While ill, Marie exhibits anxious and secretive behavior, and later under interrogation, she denies knowledge and defers to her father's explanations.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Sick and feverish, holding a canary and letter-opener with apparent anxiety.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Guarded and evasive when questioned by the schoolteacher, maintaining denial of knowledge.
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: What Marie knows about the village incidents and her intentions with the letter-opener and canary.

cross_scene_arcs.title: Punishment to Trust
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Martin is sentenced to corporal punishment and marked with a white ribbon, reintegrates into family rituals, defiantly resists restraints during a fire, and is eventually freed upon his father's trust.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Sentenced to 10 strokes of the cane and denied parental contact.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Freed from nightly restraints and white ribbon, trusted by his father.
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: Whether Martin can sustain the expected purity and trust.

cross_scene_arcs.title: Spiritual Crisis and Confession
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Martin tests God's will by risking his life on a bridge, then confesses to his father under interrogation, moving from seeking divine approval to admitting guilt.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Seeking divine approval through a dangerous act.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Confessed sinner in his father's eyes, embraced after admission.
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: The consequences of his confession and internal guilt.

cross_scene_arcs.title: Investigation and Protection
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Martin shows concern for a missing child, is accused by the schoolteacher during questioning, and is defended by his father who dismisses the accusation.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Involved in investigating Hansi's disappearance with other children.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Under paternal protection after the schoolteacher's accusation is rejected.
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: Whether the schoolteacher's suspicions will persist or lead to further scrutiny.

cross_scene_arcs.title: Romance with Eva
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Schoolteacher's relationship with Eva progresses from a hesitant meeting through shared moments and family approval to an engagement, though tempered by social proprieties and the outbreak of war.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Single and meeting Eva for the first time on the village road.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Engaged to Eva with marriage plans imminent as war is declared.
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: The impact of the impending war on their marriage and future.

cross_scene_arcs.title: Village Investigation and Conflict
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Schoolteacher becomes increasingly involved in village disturbances, from student misbehavior to a criminal investigation, facing skepticism from authorities and moral dilemmas.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Addressing Martin's dangerous behavior and deciding to inform his father.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: In conflict with the pastor after disclosing the midwife's knowledge of the crime.
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: The outcome of the investigation and the schoolteacher's role in the village amidst growing tensions.
